entity.summary: Sui liquidity platform and decentralized exchange providing DLMM and CLMM automated-market-maker engines for token swaps, liquidity deployment, fee generation, and project liquidity management.
entity.notes: Current first-party Ferra website remains reachable. DefiLlama classifies Ferra DLMM as a Sui DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and substantial current and cumulative DEX volume. HEI consolidates DLMM and CLMM source representations into one Ferra entity.

evidence.title: Ferra official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party Ferra domain remains reachable and presents the protocol as a Sui liquidity layer and social DEX.

evidence.title: Ferra DLMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Ferra DLMM as a Sui DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and active DEX volume.

evidence.title: Ferra exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Ferra DLMM and CLMM source rows on Sui; HEI consolidates them into one exchange entity.
